_comment: Guaranteed passive profiling for Codex CLI (mirror of .claude/settings.json). Codex runs hook_record.mjs on every command tool call + session start, appending a record to tmp/session_profiles/ that `node tools/ai.mjs status` reads. The handler filters to command-bearing tool calls itself, so a broad matcher is fine. If hooks do not fire, ensure `[features] hooks = true` in .codex/config.toml (hooks are enabled by default in current Codex).
